safety_use_cases.label: Refine obstruction regions to reduce false positives
safety_use_cases.description: Adjust active regions so materials inside the marked layout and black floor areas are not flagged as obstructions or spills, and only real obstructions are detected.

evidence.quote: It's been obstructed for materials that are inside the layout.

evidence.quote: Yeah, so it is inside the layout, but it's detected by Voxel as it will be an obstruction and it isn't.
evidence.speaker: Casey Carlisle <fake.casey.carlisle@titanstackoperations.com>

evidence.quote: The same, but we might need to use the gray or white areas because the black areas, can say, or the black spots might be detected as spills or obstructions.
evidence.speaker: Casey Carlisle <fake.casey.carlisle@titanstackoperations.com>

evidence.quote: This might work to detect real, uh, incidents about obstruction and not only, uh, things in the yellow line.
evidence.speaker: Casey Carlisle <fake.casey.carlisle@titanstackoperations.com>

safety_use_cases.description: Detect and flag warehouse vehicle no-stop violations at intersections/end of aisles and monitor PIT proximity/distances across warehouse cameras; current 'no stop' events are not being reliably detected.

evidence.quote: And that's actually not an industrial vehicle, like, not a forklift or something like that. I'm not sure if Voxel can understand or know about it.

safety_use_cases.label: Filter cleaning-related spills via timing threshold
safety_use_cases.description: Use a dwell-time threshold so brief wet floors from mopping do not trigger spill incidents; they agreed to increase the threshold from a few minutes to tens of minutes.

evidence.quote: oh, I remember another thing that they were going to see if it's possible to add some timing to the spill category, just like you do in obstruction, because when they are mopping the floor, we have some spills incidents that are not real.
evidence.speaker: Casey Carlisle <fake.casey.carlisle@titanstackoperations.com>

evidence.quote: Yeah, so for example, most of them are not real spills.
evidence.speaker: Casey Carlisle <fake.casey.carlisle@titanstackoperations.com>

evidence.quote: I just confirmed we can change the, so the spills are set to a few minutes right now.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Basically, if we've seen a spill for more than a few minutes, we will trigger it.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: 20 to start?
evidence.speaker: Casey Carlisle <fake.casey.carlisle@titanstackoperations.com>

evidence.quote: Okay.

safety_use_cases.label: Handle low-visibility safety vests in PPE detection
